title: Filter users by a pinned id list
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.list_users/1` that takes a list of user ids and returns the matching User structs. Use `u.id in ^ids` with the pin operator to parameterize the list. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step: `in ^ids` is the canonical parameterized list form. One-shot mechanics.
